narrative: Hot US CPI at 3.8% reignites Fed hike fears and drives a dollar bid — DXY steady +0.01% as energy-led inflation surprises to the upside; gold higher +0.38% near $4,704; equities -0.16%; VIX 18.0. AUD/JPY bilateral divergence (1.184% spread) remains the dominant G8 theme as RBA 4.35% vs BoJ 0.75% carry (+360bp) anchors the cross at 114.15. NZD/USD holds 0.5963 ahead of local inflation data. Watch RBNZ Inflation Expectations at 03:00 UTC.
